goals: Analyze your repository structure immediately. Identify and instantly delete all unused or redundant files created in previous cycles (such as web_scraper.py, data_manager.py, nlp_processor.py, infiltrator.py, website_infiltrator.py, vulnerability_analyzer.py, and any temporary .txt or .json files). Do NOT wait for a 30-day inactivity threshold; execute the deletion immediately in this cycle. CRITICAL SAFETY RULE: You must preserve and never delete core.py, filesystem.py, .github/workflows/, or any essential system configuration files.
